# Distributions {.unnumbered}

Graphs displaying distributions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(scales)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(colorblindr)
library(downlit)
# fonts ----
library(extrafont)
library(sysfonts)
source("_common.R")
# use font
showtext::showtext_auto()
# set theme
ggplot2::theme_set(theme_ggp2g(
    base_size = 15))
```

```{r}
#| label: status
#| results: "asis"
#| echo: false
# status ----
# polishing, restructuring, drafting, complete
status("restructuring")
```
